polname: Users can view their own staff record
qual:
((user_id = auth.uid()) OR (clinic_id IN ( SELECT clinic_members.clinic_id
   FROM clinic_members
  WHERE (clinic_members.user_id = auth.uid()))))
((clinic_id IN ( SELECT user_clinic_ids() AS user_clinic_ids)) OR is_admin())
